pages.text: Magic Storage is a powerful storage system that lets you store unlimited quantities of items in a single network. All you need is a $(l:magic_storage:storage_core)$(thing)Storage Core$()$(), some $(l:magic_storage:unit_tiers)$(thing)Storage Units$()$(), and a $(l:magic_storage:storage_terminal)$(thing)Terminal$()$().
Start by placing a $(item:magic_storage:storage_core) on the ground. This is the heart of your network - it holds all stored items and energy pools.

Next, place one or more $(item:magic_storage:storage_unit_t1) adjacent to the Core. Each Storage Unit adds $(thing)type slots$() to your network, allowing you to store different kinds of items.$(br2)Finally, attach a $(item:magic_storage:storage_terminal) to any block in the network to access your items.

All blocks in a Magic Storage network must be $(thing)adjacent$() (touching one of the 6 faces). The network scans outwards from the Core up to 64 blocks deep.$(br2)You can have only $(thing)one Storage Core$() per network. If two Cores touch, they will be treated as separate networks.
